eyebrow.zh: 开源 · 红队 · 无需账号

headline.zh:
让你的 Agent
先被攻击一次再上线
headline.en:
Attack your Agent
before you ship it

sub.zh: 自动发明 prompt-injection 攻击，重放劫持，产出可复用的强化训练数据——单进程 CLI，今天就能跑。
sub.en: Auto-invents prompt-injection attacks, replays the hijack, and emits reusable hardening training data — a single-process CLI that runs today.

title.zh: 一条命令，看见你的 Agent 被劫持
title.en: One command, watch your Agent get hijacked

body.zh: 无需 API key——重放一个手工注入，当场打印 Agent 被诱导调用了不该调用的工具。
body.en: No API key needed — replay one hand-crafted injection and watch the Agent get tricked into calling a tool it shouldn't.

title.zh: 自动发明攻击，不止手写那几个
title.en: Auto-invents attacks, not just the few you'd hand-write

body.zh: 攻击模型自动发明多个注入载荷并逐一重放——你不再需要手写少量注入 prompt、跑一次就扔。
body.en: The attacker model invents multiple injection payloads and replays each — you stop hand-writing a few prompts and running them once.

title.zh: 每次劫持都变成训练数据

body.zh: 每次成功的攻击被转成「攻击 + 期望安全响应 + exploit 轨迹」的训练对，写成 JSONL——红队的失败从此承载可复用信号。
body.en: Each successful attack becomes a training pair — attack + expected safe response + exploit trace — written as JSONL. Red-team failures finally carry reusable signal.

headline.zh: 把红队循环开给每一个造 Agent 的团队
headline.en: Open the red-team loop to every team building an Agent

sub.zh: 开源 · MIT · 单进程 CLI，今天就能跑。
sub.en: Open-source · MIT · single-process CLI, runs today.
